parameters.query:
SELECT cl.*,cc.whatsapp_do_contato,cc.ctwa_clid,cc.fbclid,cc.gclid,cc.id_da_campanha_de_anuncio,cc.id_do_conjunto_de_anuncio,cc.id_do_anuncio, cc.order_id, cc.data_da_ultima_mensagem
FROM `chatwoot_labels` as cl
	LEFT JOIN ttconversa_criada as cc
    	ON RIGHT(cl.phone55,8) = RIGHT(cc.whatsapp_do_contato,8)
   WHERE RIGHT(cl.phone55,8)='{{ $json.lead.phone55.slice(-8) }}'
AND (fbclid is not null or ctwa_clid is not null or gclid is not null)
ORDER BY cc.data_da_ultima_mensagem DESC
LIMIT 1;

parameter.name: data
parameter.value:
={{ JSON.stringify([
  $json.ctwa_clid
    ? {
        action_source: "business_messaging",
        event_name: $json.event || "ViewContent",
        event_time: Math.floor($now.toSeconds()),
        messaging_channel: "whatsapp",
        user_data: {
          ph: [
            $json.phone55.toString().hash("sha256"),
            ("+" + $json.phone55.toString()).hash("sha256")
          ],
          ctwa_clid: $json.ctwa_clid,
          page_id: $json.pixel.page
        }
      }
    : {
        event_name: $json.event || "ViewContent",
        event_time: Math.floor($now.toSeconds()),
        action_source: "website",
        event_id: ($json.event || "ViewContent") + ".." + $json.order_id,
        event_source_url: "https://aliraclinica.com.br/",
        opt_out: false,
        value: 1,
        currency: "BRL",
        user_data: {
          ...($json?.cliente?.email ? { em: [$json.cliente.email.hash("sha256")] } : {}),
          ...($json?.cliente?.name ? { fn: [$json.cliente.name.split(" ")[0].hash("sha256")] } : {}),
          ...($json?.cliente?.name?.split(" ")[1] ? { ln: [$json.cliente.name.split(" ")[1].hash("sha256")] } : {}),
          ...($json?.IDUsuarioWPP ? { subscription_id: $json.IDUsuarioWPP } : {}),
          ...($json?.cliente?.id ? { external_id: [$json.cliente.id.toString().hash("sha256")] } : {}),
          ...($json?.user_agent ? { client_user_agent: $json.user_agent } : {}),

          ...($json?.fbclid ? {
            fbc: "fb.1." + Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000) + "." + $json.fbclid
          } : {}),

          fbp: $json.fbp
            ? $json.fbp
            : "fb.1." + Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000) + "." + Math.floor(Math.random() * 10000000000),

          ph: [
            $json.phone55.toString().hash("sha256"),
            ("+" + $json.phone55.toString()).hash("sha256")
          ],

          page_id: $json.pixel.page
        },
        attribution_data: {
          attribution_share: "1",
          ...($json?.id_do_anuncio ? { ad_id: $json.id_do_anuncio } : {}),
          ...($json?.id_do_conjunto_de_anuncio ? { adset_id: $json.id_do_conjunto_de_anuncio } : {}),
          ...($json?.id_da_campanha_de_anuncio ? { campaign_id: $json.id_da_campanha_de_anuncio } : {}),
          attribution_model: "customized_multi_touch",
          visit_time: Math.floor($json.data_da_ultima_mensagem.toDateTime().toSeconds())
        }
      }
]) }}
